title: SERP Checker Input
description: Check keyword rankings in Google search results. Track which position your URL holds for target keywords.

keywords.title: Keywords to Check
keywords.description: List of keywords to check rankings for. Each keyword triggers one Google search.

targetUrl.title: Target URL (for rank tracking)
targetUrl.description: Optional. Your domain or URL to track position for (e.g., 'example.com'). When set, each result shows your rank position for that URL.

languageCode.title: Language Code
languageCode.description: Language for search results (hl parameter). Examples: 'en' (English), 'ja' (Japanese), 'es' (Spanish), 'de' (German).

numResults.title: Number of Results Per Keyword
numResults.description: How many SERP results to extract per keyword (top 10, 20, 50, or 100).

includeFeatures.title: Include SERP Features
includeFeatures.description: When enabled, detects featured snippets, People Also Ask, local packs, and knowledge panels in the results.

delayMs.title: Request Delay (ms)
delayMs.description: Delay between searches to avoid rate limiting. Minimum recommended: 2000ms.
